creator: emz@norma.perm.ru
text:
I did some researching and found this:

# make V=1
WAF_MAKE=1 python ./buildtools/bin/waf build
Waf: Entering directory `/usr/tmp/usr/ports/net/samba4/work/samba-4.0.7/bin'

14:56:51 runner gcc -pipe -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -DLDAP_DEPRECATED
-DDEVELOPER -DDEBUG_PASSWORD -fPIC -pthread -Wall -Wshadow
-Werror=strict-prototypes -Wstrict-prototypes -Werror=pointer-arith
-Wpointer-arith -Wcast-align -Werror=write-strings -Wwrite-strings
-Werror-implicit-function-declaration -Wformat=2 -Wno-format-y2k
-Wmissing-prototypes -fno-common -Werror=address -Wcast-qual
-DSTATIC_replace_test_MODULES=NULL -DSTATIC_replace_test_MODULES_PROTO

-I../include/public -Idefault/source4 -I../source4 -Idefault/lib

-I../lib/socket_wrapper -Idefault/lib/nss_wrapper -I../lib/nss_wrapper
-Idefault/lib/uid_wrapper -I../lib/uid_wrapper -I/usr/local/include
-D_SAMBA_BUILD_=4 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1
-D_XOPEN_SOURCE_EXTENDED=1 ../lib/replace/test/testsuite.c -c -o
